action: Execute SQL joining mesonet_stations LEFT JOIN mesonet_measurements, grouped by station, to list all stations with their island, elevation, most recent reading timestamp, and OK/STALE/NEVER status based on a 7-day threshold.
sql: SELECT s.station_id, s.name, s.island, ROUND(s.elevation_m::numeric, 0) AS elev_m, MAX(m.timestamp) AS last_reading, CASE WHEN MAX(m.timestamp) < now() - interval '7 days' THEN 'STALE' WHEN MAX(m.timestamp) IS NULL THEN 'NEVER' ELSE 'OK' END AS status FROM mesonet_stations s LEFT JOIN mesonet_measurements m ON m.station_id = s.station_id GROUP BY s.station_id, s.name, s.island, s.elevation_m ORDER BY status DESC, s.island, s.station_id;
